body: ``` [Log] WARN – "Ignoring the error while validating workspace folder webvm:/workspace - ENOPRO: No file system provider found for resourc…" (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) "Ignoring the error while validating workspace folder webvm:/workspace - ENOPRO: No file system provider found for resource 'webvm:/workspace'" [Warning] The web worker extension host is started in a same-origin iframe! (workbench.web.main.js, line 1886) [Log] INFO – "Found additional builtin location extensions in env" – Array (2) (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) Array (2) [Log] INFO – "Ignoring fetching additional builtin extensions from gallery as it is disabled." (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Log] INFO – "Ignoring fetching additional builtin extensions from gallery as it is disabled." (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Log] WARN – "No search provider registered for scheme: webvm, waiting" (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Error] Webview fatal error: Error: Could not register service workers: TypeError: Script https://14n8e0gjiiuqiqfagsalrrs2lsdhvacucl8k48umcib6ibrtjhp6.vscode-cdn.net/insider/ef65ac1ba57f57f2a3961bfe94aa20481caca4c6/out/vs/workbench/contrib/webview/browser/pre/service-worker.js?v=4&vscode-resource-base-authority=vscode-resource.vscode-cdn.net&remoteAuthority= load failed. (anonymous function) [Log] INFO – "Ignoring fetching additional builtin extensions from gallery as it is disabled." (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Log] INFO – "Ignoring fetching additional builtin extensions from gallery as it is disabled." (workbench.web.main.js, line 657, x2) [Log] INFO – "Updating additional builtin extensions cache" (workbench.web.main.js, line 657) [Error] Source Map loading errors (x7) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (main.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-unicode11.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-clipboard.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (addon-webgl.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (xterm.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (workbench.js.map, line 0) [Error] Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 () (layout.contribution.darwin.js.map, line 0) [Error] TypeError: undefined is not an object (evaluating 'c.a4.a1') y8 (cx_esm.js:1:190555) y_ (cx_esm.js:1:187731) [Log] [26:26] TODO: Advisory locking is only stubbed (fa35fb59-9ce5-4932-a628-38f2da6e35c8, line 1, x9) [Log] [28:28] TODO: Advisory locking is only stubbed (fa35fb59-9ce5-4932-a628-38f2da6e35c8, line 1, x9) ``` We should remove fix errors, and warnings, to all TODOs, make sure source maps are provided for all the web code, so console output as the result should contain minimum of any mess. We should use https://www.npmjs.com/package/debug, and by default all namespaces should be turned off, so we clearly see any warnings and errors, and as soon we see them, we can report the issue. Namespaced debug should be combined with https://github.com/link-foundation/log-lazy, so we don't hurt performance when debug logs are disabled. ``` rust-web-box — anonymous in-browser Rust sandbox Powered by CheerpX (leaningtech/webvm) and VS Code Web. [rust-web-box] Booting Linux VM… ..[rust-web-box] VM stage: syncing-workspace… ................. [rust-web-box] Linux VM ready ✓ [rust-web-box] disk: ./disk/rust-alpine.ext2 [rust-web-box] Workspace mirrored to /workspace — try `cargo run`. root@rust-web-box:/workspace# ды bash: ды: command not found root@rust-web-box:/workspace# ls Cargo.lock Cargo.toml README.md src target root@rust-web-box:/workspace# tree . ├── Cargo.lock ├── Cargo.toml ├── README.md ├── src │ └── main.rs └── target ├── CACHEDIR.TAG ├── debug │ ├── build │ ├── deps │ │ ├── hello-fde64fc025955619 │ │ └── hello-fde64fc025955619.d │ ├── examples │ ├── hello │ ├── hello.d │ └── incremental └── release ├── build ├── deps │ ├── hello-2b7fd4f5e9982670 │ └── hello-2b7fd4f5e9982670.d ├── examples ├── hello ├── hello.d └── incremental 13 directories, 13 files root@rust-web-box:/workspace# cargo --version cargo 1.78.0 root@rust-web-box:/workspace# cargo --version cargo 1.78.0 root@rust-web-box:/workspace# cargo build Finished `dev` profile [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 15.15s root@rust-web-box:/workspace# cargo run Finished `dev` profile [unoptimized + debuginfo] target(s) in 0.66s Running `target/debug/hello` Hello from rust-web-box! This binary was compiled inside CheerpX. root@rust-web-box:/workspace# ``` The begging of output at: ``` rust-web-box — anonymous in-browser Rust sandbox Powered by CheerpX (leaningtech/webvm) and VS Code Web. [rust-web-box] Booting Linux VM… ..[rust-web-box] VM stage: syncing-workspace… ................. [rust-web-box] Linux VM ready ✓ [rust-web-box] disk: ./disk/rust-alpine.ext2 [rust-web-box] Workspace mirrored to /workspace — try `cargo run`. ``` Is not polished enough, dots should appear only after `[rust-web-box] Booting Linux VM…`, and should be not mixed with anything else. We should drop in all codebase and documentation the word `anonymous`. `in-browser Rust sandbox` is just enough. We need to download all logs and data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), in which we will reconstruct timeline/sequence of events, list of each and all requirements from the issue, find root causes of the each problem, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions). If there is not enough data to find actual root cause, add debug output and verbose mode if not present, that will allow us to find root cause on next iteration. If issue related to any other repository/project, where we can report issues on GitHub, please do so. Each issue must contain reproducible examples, workarounds and suggestions for fix the issue in code. Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context autocompacts and you can continue indefinetely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: All remaining issues must be fixed
